name: Chocolate Walnut Butter Bread
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces Semisweet Chocolate  (broken or chopped into large pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine the warm water and yeast. Stir and allow to stand for 5 minutes until dissolved.
2. Add the flour, sugar, salt, and eggs to the yeast mixture. Beat vigorously until well blended.
3. Gradually beat in the butter, tablespoon at a time, until all is incorporated and the batter is smooth.
4. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and let the batter rise until it has doubled in size.
5. Stir the batter gently and fold in the walnuts and chocolate pieces.
6. Spoon the batter into two greased 8 1/2 x 4 1/2 x 3-inch loaf pans, filling them about half full to allow for nicely rounded tops when baked.
7. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
8. Bake for about 45 minutes. Remove from the oven and let rest for 5 minutes before turning the loaves out onto racks.
9. Makes 2 loaves, approximately 16 slices each.
